factors.rationale: The product is the dominant focal point and easily identifiable.
The accessory is shown being held with a phone, indicating a clear use case.
The image suggests a specific benefit related to style and travel readiness.
The layout is clear, with readable text and no distracting elements.
The texture and details of the case are visible, enhancing perceived quality.
The brand name and context provide a credible trust signal.
The image has strong contrast and is easily readable on a mobile screen.
